Data

Data report · Florida DBPR public inspection records · June 2026

Comebacks & collapses

A single grade is a snapshot. Stack a restaurant’s inspections in order and you get the story — the kitchens that clawed their way up, and the ones that fell off a cliff. Each bar is one inspection, taller meaning cleaner, scored from the violations the state recorded that day.

↑ Biggest comebacks

A 98
EL TEQUILAS AUTHENTIC MEXICAN RESTAURANT South Daytona · 9 inspections

Jul 2025: 9 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 7 basic → Apr 2026: 2 basic.

B 82
HILTON COCOA BEACH OCEANFRONT RESORT Cocoa Beach · 9 inspections

Aug 2025: 6 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 9 basic → May 2026: 1 intermediate.

B 84
TIKI WEST RAW BAR & GRILL Tavares · 4 inspections

Aug 2025: 4 high-priority, 8 intermediate, 28 basic → Mar 2026: 2 intermediate, 10 basic.

A 100
CRABBY'S OCEANSIDE Daytona Beach · 7 inspections

Aug 2025: 8 high-priority, 3 basic → Mar 2026: a clean inspection.

A 99
GRILLE AT RIVERVIEW New Smyrna Bch · 8 inspections

Sep 2025: 6 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 4 basic → Jun 2026: 1 basic.

A 98
CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE INC West Melbourne · 3 inspections

Sep 2025: 6 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 13 basic → Feb 2026: 2 basic.

A 99
CHART HOUSE Daytona Bch · 5 inspections

Oct 2025: 6 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 13 basic → May 2026: 1 basic.

A 95
PAPI PINCHO Groveland · 4 inspections

Oct 2025: 7 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 6 basic → May 2026: 1 intermediate, 2 basic.

↓ Biggest collapses

F 39
SIMON PARRILLA BAR AND GRILL Orlando · 3 inspections

Sep 2025: a clean inspection → Apr 2026: 3 high-priority, 6 intermediate, 19 basic.

F 44
TITUSVILLE BEEF O' BRADY'S Titusville · 3 inspections

Aug 2025: a clean inspection → May 2026: 3 high-priority, 6 intermediate, 14 basic.

F 5
SHARON'S HOMESTYLE COOKIN Orlando · 3 inspections

Sep 2025: 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 11 basic → May 2026: 9 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 10 basic.

F 46
ROBATA JAPANESE STEAKHOUSE Clermont · 3 inspections

Jul 2025: 1 basic → Apr 2026: 2 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 16 basic.

F 53
MILLER'S ALE HOUSE INC Orlando · 2 inspections

Dec 2025: 1 intermediate, 2 basic → Jan 2026: 4 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 12 basic.

F 51
FLAGLER TAVERN New Smyrna Beach · 4 inspections

Aug 2025: 1 high-priority, 1 basic → May 2026: 4 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 8 basic.

F 40
KABOOKI SUSHI Orlando · 3 inspections

Oct 2025: 1 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 1 basic → Jun 2026: 4 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 13 basic.

F 55
SONAPA GRILLE New Smyrna Beach · 2 inspections

Nov 2025: 1 intermediate, 4 basic → Apr 2026: 5 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 2 basic.

More data reports

  • Flagship Loved but Failing Great reviews, failing grades — the rating-vs-safety gap, widest first.

  • Counterintuitive The Disney Paradox The cleanest kitchens in Central Florida are inside Walt Disney World.
  • Counterintuitive Cuisines, Ranked Which cuisines grade cleanest — and which really don’t.
  • Enforcement Emergency Orders Where the state took its strongest action.

Source: Florida DBPR public inspection records, as of June 2026. Each bar applies our scoring formula (−8 per high-priority, −3 per intermediate, −1 per basic violation) to the violations recorded at that inspection; the current grade reflects the most recent visit. Only restaurants with two or more inspections on record are shown. Methodology →

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
